steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The blank is the main verb for the subject 'more writers from Chad, including Lamko.' The phrase 'including Lamko' is a parenthetical — strip it out and the core subject is the plural noun phrase 'more writers from Chad.' A plural subject needs a plural verb.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — have begun: Plural verb — agrees with 'more writers.' ✓
  • Choice B — is beginning: Singular verb — does not agree with the plural subject. ✗
  • Choice C — has begun: Singular verb — does not agree with the plural subject. ✗
  • Choice D — begins: Singular verb — does not agree with the plural subject. ✗
A is correct.
